All Inclusive
Unlimited dining at our dedicated All Inclusive Restaurant in the Flower Building — a refined buffet in the Mediterranean spirit of Flower Restaurant.
7:30–10:30 Breakfast
12:30–14:40 Lunch
17:00–18:00 Snack
19:00–21:00 Dinner
Drinks at all four bars — the two pool bars, the All Inclusive Restaurant bar, and the Beach Bar — featuring a curated selection of local and international beverages.
Plus full access to both indoor pools, both outdoor pools, the private beach, and every property facility.
Upgrade an evening
Premium à la carte cocktails & wines at any bar, or a special dinner at Flower Restaurant or Brutal Steakhouse — just ask.
Three Restaurants & a Beach Lounge

Where you will dine & unwind

In summer, our à la carte restaurants relocate outdoors by the pool with live music — al fresco under the stars.

Opens · May 21, 2026
All Inclusive Restaurant
Buffet · Mediterranean
Exclusive to All Inclusive guests. A buffet-style Mediterranean selection in the refined spirit of Flower Restaurant — located in the Flower Building, with its own dedicated bar. Opening for the 2026 season on May 21st.
Breakfast7:30 – 10:30
Lunch12:30 – 14:40
Afternoon snack17:00 – 18:00
Dinner19:00 – 21:00
Flower Restaurant
Mediterranean · Fish
Fresh seafood and Mediterranean flavors with live music. À la carte. Our chef's Dégustation Menu is the experience guests remember most.
Sea bass, hollandaise, asparagus1,800 ALL
Truffle risotto, chanterelles950 ALL

Brutal Steakhouse
Steakhouse · Meat
Where everything starts with the meat. À la carte, in the Garden Building. Tournedos Rossini, truffle pastas, and our signature Brutal Tiramisu.
Tournedos Rossini, foie gras & truffle3,000 ALL
Rigatoni, veal tartare & black truffle1,250 ALL

Beach Bar
Beachfront · Cocktails
Toes in the sand, cocktail in hand. Our beachfront lounge serves signature cocktails, fresh juices and light bites from morning coffee through golden-hour sunsets and beyond — with the Adriatic at your feet.
Signature "Gonxhe" Cocktail850 ALL
Aperol Spritz650 ALL
Fresh fruit & cheese platter1,200 ALL

Two Buildings · Two Personalities

Where you will rest

Each building has its own character — the classic luxe of the Flower Building or the modern serenity of the Garden Building. Both are part of the same property.

Flower Rooms
Flower Building · Classic
Plush velvet headboards, rich textures, and timeless luxury. The original Flower aesthetic — warm, romantic, and quietly grand.
Garden Rooms
Garden Building · Modern
Soft natural palettes, clean architectural lines, freestanding bathtubs. A contemporary retreat for those who love light, calm, and quiet design.
Special Stays

Make it unforgettable

Dégustation Menu
A 10-course chef's journey at Flower Restaurant or Brutal Steakhouse — with complimentary table decor to turn your evening into the moment of the night.
6,500 ALLper person
Signature Spa Rituals
Couple Massage (50 min, €99) or our most-loved Tranquility Body Massage + Body Scrub (75 min, €79). Pure indulgence by our Balinese therapists with Comfort Zone.
from €79per ritual
Room Upgrade
Elevate the rest of your stay — a beautiful upgrade for a small daily premium. Ask Gonxhe what's available for your dates.
from €20per night
Music · Performance · Atmosphere

Events at Flower

From live jazz by the pool to dance performances under the stars and our signature Beach Party nights — there is always something happening at Flower. Ask Gonxhe what's on tonight.
